form_field_mapping.environment: Do you require credentials for the test or production environment(s)
form_field_mapping.auth_method: We support both password and public key based authentication.  Please indicate how we should authenticate your connection to our platform
form_field_mapping.password_restrictions: Do you have any password complexity restrictions or requirements.  Our default is 32 character alphanumeric with no special characters, ASCII encoded.
form_field_mapping.password_requirements_detail: Specify your password restriction requirements.  We will attempt to accommodate these, but may not always be able to.
form_field_mapping.public_key: As you selected public key based authentication, please paste the key below.  This should be a mininmum of 2048 bits, using RSA, Ed25519, or ECDSA algorithms and should be the entire key not a fingerpri
form_field_mapping.delivery_method: We supply credentials using a password-protected dissolvable link to a named contact.  The named contact needs to supply an email address to receive the link and also choose a second delivery method f
form_field_mapping.recipient_email: Provide the email address of the person you wish to receive the secure credentials link
form_field_mapping.recipient_phone: Provide the contact number for delivery of the password, including the country code, in international format - (e.g. +44 12345 678901) or a Telegram handle if using Telegram.
form_field_mapping.ip_whitelist: In addition to authentication, our service is IP locked to permitted source addresses.  Please provide all source addresses that will need to connect.  Permitted formats are individual addresses, IP a
